examples.sentence: こういう時には家族に話すに限る。
examples.translation: At times like this, there's nothing better than talking to your family.
examples.translationEn: At times like this, there's nothing better than talking to your family.
examples.romaji: Kou iu toki ni wa kazoku ni hanasu ni kagiru.

examples.sentence: 寒い冬には温かいお茶に限る。
examples.translation: In cold winter, there's nothing better than warm tea.
examples.translationEn: In cold winter, there's nothing better than warm tea.
examples.romaji: Samui fuyu ni wa atatakai ocha ni kagiru.

examples.sentence: 疲れたときは、よい睡眠に限る。
examples.translation: When you are tired, nothing is better than a good sleep.
examples.translationEn: When you are tired, nothing is better than a good sleep.
examples.romaji: Tsukareta toki wa, yoi suimin ni kagiru.

examples.sentence: ダイエットするなら、運動に限る。
examples.translation: If you want to go on a diet, there is nothing better than exercise.
examples.translationEn: If you want to go on a diet, there is nothing better than exercise.
examples.romaji: Daietto suru nara, undou ni kagiru.

examples.sentence: このサラダはにんじんをぬいたサラダです。
examples.translation: This is a salad with the carrots removed.
examples.translationEn: This is a salad with the carrots removed.
examples.romaji: Kono sarada wa ninjin o nuita sarada desu.

examples.sentence: 彼はコーヒーから砂糖をぬいた。
examples.translation: He removed the sugar from the coffee.
examples.translationEn: He removed the sugar from the coffee.
examples.romaji: Kare wa koohii kara satou o nuita.

examples.sentence: 私は料理から塩をぬいた。
examples.translation: I removed the salt from the cooking.
examples.translationEn: I removed the salt from the cooking.
examples.romaji: Watashi wa ryouri kara shio o nuita.

examples.sentence: 彼女は服からシミをぬいた。
examples.translation: She removed the stain from the clothes.
examples.translationEn: She removed the stain from the clothes.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa fuku kara shimi o nuita.

examples.sentence: 私たちは、彼ぬいて全員が集まることができました。
examples.translation: We were able to gather everyone except for him.
examples.translationEn: We were able to gather everyone except for him.
examples.romaji: Watashitachi wa, kare nuite zen'in ga atsumaru koto ga dekimashita.

examples.sentence: このレストランはお子様メニューをぬいてすべてが美味しい。
examples.translation: Everything at this restaurant is delicious except for the kids' menu.
examples.translationEn: Everything at this restaurant is delicious except for the kids' menu.
examples.romaji: Kono resutoran wa okosama menyuu o nuite subete ga oishii.

examples.sentence: 今日の仕事は昼休みをぬいて忙しかった。
examples.translation: Today's work was busy except for the lunch break.
examples.translationEn: Today's work was busy except for the lunch break.
examples.romaji: Kyou no shigoto wa hiruyasumi o nuite isogashikatta.

examples.sentence: 休暇の日をぬいて、毎日彼は働きます。
examples.translation: He works every day except for the holidays.
examples.translationEn: He works every day except for the holidays.
examples.romaji: Kyuuka no hi o nuite, mainichi kare wa hatarakimasu.

examples.sentence: 彼は一日中本を読みぬく。
examples.translation: He will read the book all day long.
examples.translationEn: He will read the book all day long.
examples.romaji: Kare wa ichinichijuu hon o yominuku.

examples.sentence: 私はこのプロジェクトを終わらせぬく。
examples.translation: I will finish this project completely.
examples.translationEn: I will finish this project completely.
examples.romaji: Watashi wa kono purojekuto o owarasenuku.

examples.sentence: 彼女は毎日ジムに行き、エクササイズを終わりぬく。
examples.translation: She goes to the gym every day and finishes her exercise completely.
examples.translationEn: She goes to the gym every day and finishes her exercise completely.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa mainichi jim ni iki, ekusasaizu o owari nuku.

examples.sentence: 私たちはこのゲームを解きぬく。
examples.translation: We will solve this game completely.
examples.translationEn: We will solve this game completely.
examples.romaji: Watashitachi wa kono geemu o tokinuku.

examples.sentence: 彼が来るのいかんで決めよう。
examples.translation: Let's decide depending on whether he comes or not.
examples.translationEn: Let's decide depending on whether he comes or not.
examples.romaji: Kare ga kuru no ikan de kimeyou.

examples.sentence: 試験の結果のいかんで留年が決まります。
examples.translation: Whether you repeat a year or not depends on the test results.
examples.translationEn: Whether you repeat a year or not depends on the test results.
examples.romaji: Shiken no kekka no ikan de ryuunen ga kimarimasu.

examples.sentence: 天気のいかんでは、ピクニックをキャンセルします。
examples.translation: I'll cancel the picnic depending on the weather.
examples.translationEn: I'll cancel the picnic depending on the weather.
examples.romaji: Tenki no ikan de wa, pikunikku o kyanseru shimasu.

examples.sentence: 彼の回答のいかんで、我々の次の行動が決まる。
examples.translation: Our next action depends on his response.
examples.translationEn: Our next action depends on his response.
examples.romaji: Kare no kaitou no ikan de, wareware no tsugi no koudou ga kimaru.

examples.sentence: 試験の結果のいかんでは、大学の入学許可を得られるかどうかが決まります。
examples.translation: Whether you can get permission to enter university depends on the result of the exam.
examples.translationEn: Whether you can get permission to enter university depends on the result of the exam.
examples.romaji: Shiken no kekka no ikan dewa, daigaku no nyuugaku kyoka o erareru ka douka ga kimarimasu.

examples.sentence: 天気のいかんでは、ピクニックを延期するかもしれません。
examples.translation: Depending on the weather, we might delay the picnic.
examples.translationEn: Depending on the weather, we might delay the picnic.
examples.romaji: Tenki no ikan dewa, pikunikku o enki suru kamoshiremasen.

examples.sentence: 交通事情のいかんでは、遅れることがあります。
examples.translation: Depending on the traffic conditions, I might be late.
examples.translationEn: Depending on the traffic conditions, I might be late.
examples.romaji: Koutsuujijou no ikan dewa, okureru koto ga arimasu.

examples.sentence: 経済の状況のいかんでは、会社の将来は決まります。
examples.translation: Depending on the state of the economy, the company's future is determined.
examples.translationEn: Depending on the state of the economy, the company's future is determined.
examples.romaji: Keizai no joukyou no ikan dewa, kaisha no shourai wa kimarimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんにかかわらず
examples.sentence: 結果のいかんにかかわらず、彼は決定を後悔しなかった。
examples.translation: Regardless of the outcome, he didn't regret his decision.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of the outcome, he didn't regret his decision.
examples.romaji: Kekka no ikan ni kakawarazu, kare wa kettei wo koukai shinakatta.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんにかかわらず
examples.sentence: 年齢のいかんにかかわらず、どんな人でも学ぶことは可能です。
examples.translation: Regardless of age, anyone can learn.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of age, anyone can learn.
examples.romaji: Nenrei no ikan ni kakawarazu, donna hito demo manabu koto wa kanou desu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんにかかわらず
examples.sentence: 経験のいかんにかかわらず、始めることが大切です。
examples.translation: Regardless of experience, it's important to start.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of experience, it's important to start.
examples.romaji: Keiken no ikan ni kakawarazu, hajimeru koto ga taisetsu desu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんにかかわらず
examples.sentence: 天候のいかんにかかわらず、ハイキングは予定通りに行われます。
examples.translation: Regardless of the weather, the hiking will take place as scheduled.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of the weather, the hiking will take place as scheduled.
examples.romaji: Tenkou no ikan ni kakawarazu, haikingu wa yotei doori ni okonawaremasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによっては
examples.sentence: 天気のいかんによっては、ピクニックを延期しましょう。
examples.translation: Depending on the weather, we should postpone the picnic.
examples.translationEn: Depending on the weather, we should postpone the picnic.
examples.romaji: Tenki no ikan ni yotte wa, pikunikku o enki shimashou.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによっては
examples.sentence: 試験の結果のいかんによっては、進学できます。
examples.translation: You can go on to further education, depending on the result of the exam.
examples.translationEn: You can go on to further education, depending on the result of the exam.
examples.romaji: Shiken no kekka no ikan ni yotte wa, shingaku dekimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによっては
examples.sentence: 状況のいかんによっては、早期退職を考えます。
examples.translation: Depending on the situation, I will consider early retirement.
examples.translationEn: Depending on the situation, I will consider early retirement.
examples.romaji: Joukyou no ikan ni yotte wa, souki taishoku o kangaemasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによっては
examples.sentence: 彼の反応のいかんによっては、私たちの次の行動を決めます。
examples.translation: Depending on his reaction, we will decide our next move.
examples.translationEn: Depending on his reaction, we will decide our next move.
examples.romaji: Kare no hannou no ikan ni yotte wa, watashitachi no tsugi no koudou o kimemasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによらず
examples.sentence: 試験の結果のいかんによらず、自分を信じ続けてください。
examples.translation: Regardless of the test results, keep believing in yourself.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of the test results, keep believing in yourself.
examples.romaji: Shiken no kekka no ikan ni yorazu, jibun o shinji tsudzukete kudasai.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによらず
examples.sentence: 天気のいかんによらず、毎日、ジョギングをします。
examples.translation: Regardless of the weather, I jog every day.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of the weather, I jog every day.
examples.romaji: Tenki no ikan ni yorazu, mainichi, jogingu o shimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによらず
examples.sentence: 彼の年齢のいかんによらず、彼は非常に経験豊富です。
examples.translation: Regardless of his age, he is very experienced.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of his age, he is very experienced.
examples.romaji: Kare no nenrei no ikan ni yorazu, kare wa hijou ni keikenhoufu desu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun のいかんによらず
examples.sentence: 国籍のいかんによらず、誰でもイベントに参加できます。
examples.translation: Regardless of nationality, anyone can participate in the event.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of nationality, anyone can participate in the event.
examples.romaji: Kokuseki no ikan ni yorazu, daredemo ibento ni sanka dekimasu.

examples.sentence: 彼は神のごとき存在だ。
examples.translation: He is an existence like a god.
examples.translationEn: He is an existence like a god.
examples.romaji: Kare wa kami no gotoki sonzai da.

examples.sentence: 彼女の美しさは花のごときものだ。
examples.translation: Her beauty is like a flower.
examples.translationEn: Her beauty is like a flower.
examples.romaji: Kanojo no utsukushisa wa hana no gotoki mono da.

examples.sentence: 彼は悪魔のごとき行動をした。
examples.translation: He acted like a devil.
examples.translationEn: He acted like a devil.
examples.romaji: Kare wa akuma no gotoki koudou o shita.

examples.sentence: この地方は春のごとき気候だ。
examples.translation: This region has a climate like spring.
examples.translationEn: This region has a climate like spring.
examples.romaji: Kono chiho wa haru no gotoki kiko da.
